scenarios.name: Specific Performance of Sale Agreement

checks.detail: Specific Relief Act / specific performance cited
At least one statutory section cited
Prayer for execution of sale deed
No invented amounts (10L/50L never in facts)

scenarios.draft_text:
IN THE COURT OF THE CITY CIVIL JUDGE, BENGALURU

ORIGINAL SUIT NO. _____ OF 2024

BETWEEN:

ANITA SHARMA, W/o {{HUSBAND'S NAME}}, AGED ABOUT 52 YEARS, R/O INDIRANAGAR, BENGALURU, KARNATAKA – {{PINCODE}}. ... PLAINTIFF

VERSUS

RAJESH REDDY, S/o {{FATHER'S NAME}}, AGED ABOUT 60 YEARS, R/O HSR LAYOUT, BENGALURU, KARNATAKA – {{PINCODE}}. ... DEFENDANT

SUIT FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE OF AGREEMENT TO SELL AND POSSESSION

1. The Plaintiff is Anita Sharma, aged about 52 years, resident of Indiranagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka. The Plaintiff is the prospective purchaser of the suit schedule property under the Agreement to Sell dated 10.01.2024.

2. The Defendant is Rajesh Reddy, aged about 60 years, resident of HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka. The Defendant is the absolute owner of the suit schedule property and agreed to sell the same to the Plaintiff.

3. This Hon'ble Court has jurisdiction to try this suit as the suit schedule property is situated within the local limits of the jurisdiction of this Hon'ble Court at Koramangala, Bengaluru. The cause of action arose within the jurisdiction of this Hon'ble Court.

4. The suit schedule property is more particularly described herein below:

SCHEDULE OF PROPERTY

Residential Flat No. 302, 3rd Floor, Sunshine Apartments, Koramangala, Bengaluru, Karnataka.
Area: 1200 sq ft.
East Boundary: {{EAST}}
West Boundary: {{WEST}}
North Boundary: {{NORTH}}
South Boundary: {{SOUTH}}
Survey Number: {{SURVEY_NUMBER}}

5. On 10.01.2024, the Plaintiff and Defendant entered into an Agreement to Sell regarding the suit schedule property. The total consideration agreed upon was Rs. 85,00,000/-.

6. At the time of execution of the Agreement to Sell dated 10.01.2024, the Plaintiff paid an advance amount of Rs. 25,00,000/- to the Defendant. The payment was made via RTGS bearing {{UTR_NUMBER}} HDFC20240110987654.

7. As per the terms of the Agreement to Sell, the balance consideration of Rs. 60,00,000/- was to be paid by the Plaintiff on or before 10.07.2024 against execution and registration of the Sale Deed.

READINESS AND WILLINGNESS

8. The Plaintiff has always been ready and willing to perform her part of the contract. The Plaintiff is ready and willing to pay the balance consideration of Rs. 60,00,000/- upon execution of the Sale Deed.

CAUSE OF ACTION

9. The cause of action first arose on 10.01.2024 when the Agreement to Sell was executed and the earnest money of Rs. 25,00,000/- was paid by the Plaintiff to the Defendant.

10. The cause of action further arose on 05.06.2024 when the Defendant sent a letter refusing to execute the sale deed, claiming he received a higher offer, thereby breaching the contract before the date fixed for performance.

11. The cause of action arose again on 20.06.2024 when the Plaintiff issued a legal notice calling upon the Defendant to execute the sale deed, and the Defendant refused to comply.

LEGAL BASIS

12. This suit is filed under Section 10 of the Specific Relief Act, 1963, which mandates specific performance of contracts relating to immovable property. Section 16 of the Specific Relief Act, 1963 requires the Plaintiff to plead readiness and willingness.

13. This suit is filed under Section 9 of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908, as civil courts have jurisdiction to try all suits of civil nature. Section 16 of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 provides for jurisdiction in suits for immovable property.

14. This suit is filed under Section 53A of the Transfer of Property Act, 1882, regarding part performance of contract. This suit is filed under Section 10 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872, regarding valid agreements.

15. The suit is within limitation under Article 54 of the Limitation Act, 1963, which prescribes a period of three years for specific performance of a contract from the date fixed for performance or when performance is refused.

CLAIM FOR INTEREST

16. The Plaintiff claims interest on the advance amount of Rs. 25,00,000/- from the date of refusal 05.06.2024 at the rate of {{INTEREST_RATE}}% per annum.

17. The Plaintiff claims pendente lite interest under Section 34 of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 from the date of filing the suit till realization.

18. The Plaintiff claims future interest from the date of decree till realization.

COURT FEE AND VALUATION

19. The suit is valued for the purpose of court fee and jurisdiction at Rs. 85,00,000/-. The court fee of {{COURT_FEE_AMOUNT}} is paid on the plaint.

SECTION 22 RELIEFS

20. The Plaintiff claims delivery of possession of the suit schedule property under Section 22 of the Specific Relief Act,

1963.

PRAYER

21. The Plaintiff prays for a decree:

(a) Directing the Defendant to specifically perform the Agreement to Sell dated 10.01.2024 and execute and register the Sale Deed in favour of the Plaintiff upon payment of balance consideration Rs. 60,00,000/-.
(b) Directing the Defendant to deliver possession of the suit schedule property to the Plaintiff under Section 22 of the Specific Relief Act,

1963.
(c) In the alternative, if specific performance is not granted, directing the Defendant to refund the earnest money Rs. 25,00,000/- with interest.
(d) Awarding compensation under Section 21 of the Specific Relief Act, 1963 in lieu of or in addition to specific performance.
(e) Awarding pre-suit interest on earnest money from 05.06.2024 at {{INTEREST_RATE}}% per annum.
(f) Awarding pendente lite interest under Section 34 of the Code of Civil Procedure,

1908.
(g) Awarding future interest from the date of decree till realization.
(h) Awarding costs of the suit.
(i) Granting such other and further relief as this Hon'ble Court deems fit.

LIST OF DOCUMENTS

21. The Plaintiff relies upon the following documents:

ANNEXURE-A: Original Agreement to Sell dated 10.01.2024.
ANNEXURE-B: RTGS Receipt (UTR: HDFC20240110987654).
ANNEXURE-C: Defendant's refusal letter dated 05.06.2024.
ANNEXURE-D: Legal Notice dated 20.06.2024 with postal receipt.

VERIFICATION

22. Verified that the contents of paragraphs 1 to 22 are true to my knowledge and based on records in my possession. Verified at Bengaluru on this {{DATE}} day of {{MONTH}},

2024.

23. The Plaintiff signs this verification.

ADVOCATE BLOCK

24. {{ADVOCATE_NAME}}

25. Enrollment No. {{ENROLLMENT_NO}}

26. Address: {{ADDRESS}}

27. Mobile: {{MOBILE}}
